design_philosophy.core_loop: Qualify for races, manage pit crew strategy, execute racing maneuvers against AI opponents across NASCAR season progression
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Racing rivalry and position management - balancing aggressive overtaking with vehicle damage and pit crew coordination
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Become a NASCAR champion by mastering stock car racing and building relationships with crew and competitors
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Licensed NASCAR tie-in to 1990 film; focuses on racing as a team sport requiring crew chief and pit strategy alongside driver skill

difficulty.continues_system: Season-based progression allowing multiple race attempts
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player learns NASCAR terminology and racing techniques through training sequences before competing

progression.upgrade_system: Vehicle chassis improvements and pit crew development
progression.unlock_mechanism: Sequential NASCAR races across season calendar; later races unlock as earlier races are completed
replayability_hooks: Different NASCAR tracks with unique characteristics

world_building_techniques: Licensed NASCAR circuit and real racetracks
Character relationships mirroring film narrative (Cole vs Rowdy rivalry, crew chief mentorship)
Real NASCAR driver cameos and commentary

boss_design.philosophy: Rival drivers serve as persistent antagonists across season; Rowdy Burns and Russ Wheeler represent escalating challenges
notable_bosses: Rowdy Burns - Winston Cup Champion, aggressive dirty racer, becomes friend after rivalry
Russ Wheeler - Hotshot rookie used to replace protagonist, creates new rivalry through unfair tactics

faction_indicators: Crew loyalty (Harry Hogge's team vs Daland's corporate approach)
Team ownership philosophy (Daland's multi-driver strategy vs Harry's mentorship model)
environmental_storytelling: NASCAR pit stop sequences showing crew coordination
Track-specific challenges reflecting real NASCAR venues (Daytona, Charlotte, Bristol)

sources_used: wikipedia - Days of Thunder film article (provides narrative context, character relationships, and film-to-game adaptation basis)
